items.summary: Add a per-rental "Delete" button to each rental cell on the Search Rental page results grid (the SearchRentalResultCard component). The button label must be exactly: "Delete".

Show the "Delete" button ONLY when the current rental’s createdBy matches the currently authenticated user principal; otherwise hide the button entirely (non-owners must not see any delete affordance).

Implement the delete workflow on Search Rental results: when the owner clicks "Delete", show a confirmation popup with the exact message: "Are you sure you want to delete this product?". Only if the user confirms, call the backend to delete the current rental. After successful deletion, the rental must disappear from the list immediately (by updating local/UI state and/or invalidating relevant React Query caches).

Enforce backend authorization for rental deletion so that only the rental owner (rental.createdBy == caller) can delete a rental; all other callers must be rejected. Ensure rental deletion does not automatically delete any Orders.
